tagline: Pool Service & Repair for Midlothian, Waxahachie, DeSoto & Surrounding Areas

hero.headline: Your Pool Deserves a True Expert
hero.subheadline: Owner Tom Sheehy is one of only two CBP certification instructors in all of Texas. When you trust Crystal Clear Custom Pools, you get 18 years of hands-on expertise keeping pools pristine across Midlothian, Waxahachie, and DeSoto.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Maintenance to Renovation
services.subtitle: Whether you need weekly cleaning, emergency repairs, or a full pool transformation, Crystal Clear Custom Pools delivers the expertise and reliability that North Texas homeowners have counted on since 2008.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and chemical balancing performed on a consistent schedule. Your pool stays swim-ready so you can enjoy it without lifting a finger.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Replacement
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and automation controls diagnosed and repaired by certified technicians. When replacement makes more sense, we install quality equipment that lasts.

cards.title: Pool Renovation & Remodeling
cards.description: From fun and functional upgrades to complete backyard transformations. We work closely with you to design the outdoor living space that fits your family's lifestyle.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Service
cards.description: Professional spa cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment maintenance to keep your hot tub relaxing and ready for use any night of the week.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise water testing and chemical adjustments that keep your pool safe, clear, and gentle on skin. No guesswork, no red eyes, no irritation.

cards.title: Seasonal Opening & Closing
cards.description: Proper winterization and spring start-up services that protect your pool investment and ensure a smooth transition between seasons in North Texas.

steps.title: Call or Request a Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We provide an honest assessment and straightforward pricing within 24 hours. No pressure, no gimmicks.

steps.title: We Get to Work
steps.description: Our licensed, CBP-trained technicians arrive on schedule and handle everything. Cleaning, chemistry, equipment checks, and detailed service notes after every visit.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Oasis
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and worry-free. If anything is ever less than perfect, we come back and make it right. That is the Crystal Clear promise.

about.label: Why North Texas Trusts Us
about.headline: 18 Years of Keeping Pools Crystal Clear
about.description: Crystal Clear Custom Pools was founded in 2008 by Tom Sheehy, who is one of only two instructors in the state of Texas for the CBP certification through the Pool and Hot Tub Alliance. That level of expertise flows into every service call we make. Licensed under TICL 276, our team treats every pool like our own. We have built long-term relationships with families across Midlothian, Waxahachie, DeSoto, and beyond who have trusted us for over a decade because we never compromise on quality.

features.title: Licensed & Certified Professionals
features.description: TICL #276 licensed with CBP certification. Our team is trained by one of only two state-certified instructors in Texas.

features.title: Long-Term Relationships, Not Contracts
features.description: Customers have trusted us for over 10 years. We earn your business through quality work and reliable service, not paperwork.

features.title: Quality Never Compromised
features.description: We use professional-grade equipment and proven methods. Every visit meets the high standard Tom Sheehy built this company on.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Flexible plans with no long-term contracts required.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool is not crystal clear after any service visit, call us and we will come back to make it right at no extra charge. We have built our reputation over 18 years by standing behind every job. Your satisfaction is not negotiable.

faqs.question: How soon can Crystal Clear start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are on our schedule within one week. For urgent equipment issues or green pool emergencies, we do our best to respond within 24-48 hours. Call us and we will work with your timeline.

faqs.question: What areas does Crystal Clear Custom Pools serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Midlothian, Waxahachie, DeSoto, Gun Barrel City, and surrounding communities across Ellis County and southern Dallas County. If you are unsure whether we cover your area, give us a call.

faqs.question: What makes Crystal Clear different from other pool services?
faqs.answer: Owner Tom Sheehy is one of only two CBP certification instructors in all of Texas through the Pool and Hot Tub Alliance. That expertise, combined with 18 years of hands-on experience and TICL #276 licensing, means your pool is in the most qualified hands in North Texas.

faqs.question: Do you handle pool equipment repairs?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We diagnose and repair pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and automation controls. When repair is not cost-effective, we provide honest recommendations and professional replacement with quality equipment.

faqs.question: Can you renovate or remodel my existing pool?
faqs.answer: Yes. From functional upgrades to complete backyard transformations, we work closely with you to design and build the outdoor living area your family has been dreaming about. Contact us for a free renovation consultation.

testimonials.name: George & MaryAnn S.
testimonials.text: We have used CCC Pools for over 10 years and have been extremely pleased with all services provided. Great professionalism and courtesy by all staff and prompt service in maintenance and repairs.

testimonials.name: Cyndee D.
testimonials.text: CCCPools has been taking care of my pool for nearly 5 years. They were a breath of fresh air after the previous pool service turned out to be unreliable. During a very difficult time in my family, they provided so much support and were beyond generous in every way.

testimonials.name: Jess L.
testimonials.text: Great customer service from the office to the tech's that come out. I really appreciate the knowledge they provide on keeping our pool and spa looking great and functioning correctly.
